since_last: 62% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.81%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.69% · Gold -2.14% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 62% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.81%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.81%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.89%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.89%, MRVL +6.57%, TER +5.51%, AMAT +5.19%, LRCX +5.16%. Laggards: IBM -3.59%, NET -2.31%, SAP -1.49%, WDAY -1.49%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.27% at $189.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
